site_title: MDXForge - Local-first MDX preview for AI docs
site_description: MDXForge is a local-first desktop workspace for safely previewing AI-generated MDX and Markdown documents.
not_found_description: The page you are looking for does not exist yet.
footer_tagline: A safe, local-first desktop reader for AI-generated MDX and Markdown documents.
home_meta_description: A focused desktop reader for opening, navigating, and safely rendering local MDX and Markdown files generated by AI.
home_badge: Local-first MDX preview for AI docs
home_title: Turn AI-generated MDX into a safe local reading experience.
home_description: MDXForge focuses on one workflow: generate structured MDX or Markdown with AI, open it locally, review it comfortably, and share it with confidence.
home_features_title: Everything focused on local AI docs review.
home_features_description: No SaaS dashboard, no generic editor, no cloud sync. Just a controlled preview target for generated documentation.
home_feature_local_description: Preview .mdx and .md files from your machine without publishing them to a cloud service.
home_feature_docs_description: Render AI-generated documents with a polished navigation, outline, and reading experience.
home_feature_safe_description: Use a curated component surface so generated MDX stays safe, predictable, and reviewable.
home_workflow_description: Give AI a clear MDX target, then review the result locally before sharing or publishing.
home_workflow_generate: Generate structured MDX or Markdown with AI using MDXForge authoring rules.
home_workflow_open: Open a local file or folder directly in the desktop app.
home_workflow_review: Navigate documents, inspect the outline, validate formatting, and read in a docs-style UI.
home_workflow_share: Share the source file or export path with confidence after human review.
home_safety_description: MDXForge favors a curated component whitelist and predictable rendering over arbitrary runtime capabilities.
home_download_description: The website explains the product. The core experience remains a local desktop app for Windows, macOS, and Linux.
